burren.name: The Burren
burren.notes: Two rooms: Front Room (trad/acoustic) and Back Room (ticketed shows). Irish Sessions weekly.

passim.name: Club Passim
passim.notes: Nonprofit folk/acoustic venue. 7 nights/week. Member discounts on tickets.

lamplighter-broadway.name: Lamplighter Brewing - Broadway
lamplighter-broadway.notes: Craft brewery with taproom. World Cup screenings, trivia, community events.

lamplighter-cx.name: Lamplighter Brewing - CX
lamplighter-cx.notes: Second Lamplighter taproom at Cambridge Crossing. Yoga, trivia, events.

tallship.name: The Tall Ship Boston
tallship.address: 1 E Pier Dr, East Boston, MA
tallship.notes: Floating bar and restaurant on the East Boston waterfront. Live music, DJ sets, World Cup watch parties, and wellness events.

vrcc.name: Veronica Robles Cultural Center
vrcc.notes: Latino cultural center in East Boston. Festivals, family events, and community celebrations — some held off-site at partner venues.
